recurring_patterns.pattern: Transitive dependency conflicts in multi-module projects
Agents improvising rollback steps not in the TSG

recommendations.description: Add multi-module dependency resolution strategy with explicit ordering.
recommendations.evidence: 4 of 12 sessions hit this gap. All 4 agents improvised. 2 of 4 improvisations needed rework.

recommendations.description: Add known_pattern entry for transitive conflicts so agents stop rediscovering the workaround.

self_assessment.note: Reviewed execution signals only. Would benefit from outcome signals to validate whether the improvisations actually worked.
